risk.mit: Add protective covers during transport and storage.

risk.mit: Ensure all cables have proper strain relief geometry.

generated_parts.label: Stage 1 Bell Nozzle Display Shell
generated_parts.spec: Non-functional bell_nozzle_shell display mock with cutaway_window, bolt_circle_dummy, throat label, removable engine_display_cartridge interface

requirements: Non-functional bell_nozzle_shell display mock with cutaway_window, bolt_circle_dummy, throat label, removable engine_display_cartridge interface
Engine display cartridge must be removable without full teardown
Harnesses, tubes, or service channels are routed through visible raceways or protected channels
Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover
Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry (clamp, grommet, tie point) and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius away from moving joints and sharp edges
Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating
Tank, interstage, avionics, recovery, and engine-display modules are labeled educational/display-only
Cutaway shows tank dummies, interstage datum, avionics bay, recovery bay, and removable engine display cartridge
Risk/verification focuses on mockup structure, inspection, interfaces, and unsafe overclaiming
Interstage and module joints show locating datums, bolt-circle dummies, and alignment keys so the mock stack assembles repeatably for review

verify.rule: mass budget
interface reciprocity
display_only_flowpath

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to loose bolt-circle dummy.
risk.mit: Implement locking washers and specify preload torque.

risk.desc: Risk of damage to cutaway_window during handling.
risk.mit: Add protective edge guards around cutaway_window.

risk.mit: Use durable, weather-resistant label material.

risk.desc: Engine_display_cartridge may not align properly if bolt_circle_dummy is not centered.
risk.mit: Ensure bolt_circle_dummy is accurately positioned and use alignment pins.

risk.desc: Combustion_chamber_dummy and turbopump_assembly_dummy may interfere with each other.
risk.mit: Increase spacing between combustion_chamber_dummy and turbopump_assembly_dummy.
